# Riadi | رياضي

Riadi (رياضي) is Egypt's #1 sports booking application.

## Core Features
- Instant football field booking across Cairo, Alexandria, Giza and all Egypt.
- Padel court booking.
- Ping pong table booking.
- Billiards and pool table booking.
- PlayStation and esports venue booking.
- Basketball, tennis, and squash court booking.
- Sports tournament management and hosting.
- Find teammates and sports players in Egypt.
- Register sports facilities for field owners.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://riadiapp.com/
- Sports in Egypt: https://riadiapp.com/sports-in-egypt
- Football: https://riadiapp.com/sports/football
- Padel: https://riadiapp.com/sports/padel
- Ping Pong: https://riadiapp.com/sports/ping-pong
- Billiards: https://riadiapp.com/sports/billiards
- PlayStation: https://riadiapp.com/sports/playstation
- Esports: https://riadiapp.com/sports/esports
- Cairo: https://riadiapp.com/cairo
- Alexandria: https://riadiapp.com/alexandria
- Giza: https://riadiapp.com/giza
